nasb.text: Again He said to me, “Prophesy over these bones and say to them, ‘O dry bones, hear the word of the Lord.’

esv.text: Then he said to me, “Prophesy over these bones, and say to them, O dry bones, hear the word of the Lord.

cnv.text: 他又對我說：“你要向這些骸骨說預言，對它們說：‘枯乾的骸骨啊！你們要聽耶和華的話。

ccb.text: 祂又对我说：“你对这些骸骨发预言说，‘枯骨啊，你们要听耶和华说的话！
